name: Ode to Deceit
hoverSummary: Tier 95 off-hand magic weapon with 456 ability damage and 2765 accuracy.
detailLines: Off-hand magic weapon with 4-tick speed and range 8.
Shares the Song of Destruction set bonus with Roar of Awakening.
Song of Destruction powers Essence Corruption and magic damage over time synergy.
implementationNotes: Curated off-hand magic weapon from the live Ode to Deceit page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for slot, Magic requirement, damage, accuracy, speed, and Song of Destruction set text.
